positive_prompt: Borderlands-style landscape, panoramic wasteland; cel-shaded desert, jagged cliffs, scattered ruins, cartoonish textures; vibrant sky, exaggerated colors, comic book outlines, colorful, stylized, high-detail
negative_prompt: blur/low-res/artifacts, oversaturation, cartoon/3d-render look, duplicates, floating objects
verification_prompt: borderlands style, Borderlands-style landscape, panoramic wasteland, sharp, photoreal, no blur, no oversaturation, no duplicates, no floating objects
